headline: The Bull Case For Interactive Brokers Group (IBKR) Could Change Following Expanded Korean Access Via Nextrade
summary: Interactive Brokers recently expanded access to Korean equities for clients outside Korea by adding South Korea’s first Alternative Trading System, Nextrade, which offers roughly 650 KOSPI and KOSDAQ securities, extended 8:00 AM–8:00 PM KST trading hours, and IB SmartRouting across both Nextrade and the Korea Exchange. This move further broadens the broker’s international reach and time-zone flexibility, potentially making its platform more attractive for globally active traders seeking...
